name: file-reader
description: Reads files from the filesystem on behalf of the user.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Reads the raw contents of any file path provided. There are no restrictions on which paths may be accessed — the caller may supply any absolute or relative path on the host system, including system directories and user home folders.

path.description: Absolute or relative path of the file to read. No path restrictions apply.

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: Lists all files and subdirectories at the given path recursively. Accepts any path including / or C:\.
